content.en:
"What is the origin of this woman?"

The Golden Light Sword Venerable, the Changfeng Sword Venerable, and other invincible True Ancestors were shocked.

They were just attacking a Void Heaven True Country, thinking that they would be able to capture it, but they didn't expect the Invincible True Ancestors to be captured one after another, and now there are already three Invincible True Ancestors.

Moreover, two of these three Invincible True Ancestors were powerhouses at the Invincible True Ancestor Limit Level, which could be called the first and second in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

And this third Invincible True Ancestor who appeared was also very powerful, and he easily killed six Invincible True Ancestors, and it was very likely that he was also a top-level Invincible True Ancestor.

But there are not many invincible true ancestors with names and surnames in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and almost all of them know each other, but this woman is very unfamiliar, and they have never seen it at all.

The Golden Light Sword Venerable, the Changfeng Sword Venerable, and the other invincible True Ancestors all regretted it, and they regretted attacking the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

This time, I'm afraid they're going to be completely defeated.

Once defeated, the Heavenly Sword Sect and the Zixia Sect would be ridiculed by the other Upper Triple Heaven forces, but the Void Heaven True Realm shocked the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and no force dared to casually attack a base camp with three invincible true ancestors.

After all, even if they broke through the Void Heaven True Country, they would not have any great benefits, and the price would not be something that every force could bear.

"Golden Light Sword Venerable, what should I do now?"

Changfeng Sword Venerable summoned the Golden Light Sword Venerable and asked.

It is already difficult for them to have support, and it is unrealistic to ask for help from other Upper Triple Heaven forces, after all, each force has its own mission, and the other forces can't support it, so they may be happier.

After all, the Upper Triple Heaven forces are also competitors with each other, and if you sit back and watch the decline of one Upper Triple Heaven Force, it will be a scene that all the Upper Triple Heaven forces see.

Although the Heavenly Sword Sect still has an invincible true ancestor, but it is in another battlefield, if it is mobilized from another battlefield, then wouldn't the Heavenly Sword Sect True Ancestor on the other battlefield be finished?

As a result, they are left on their own.

In the case that he could not win on his own, the Heavenly Sword Sect had no intention of fighting again.

"Retreat!"

Golden Light Sword Venerable sighed.

He didn't dare to delay any longer, once he continued to delay, more and more True Ancestors would die, and more importantly, once the Zichi True Ancestor fell, other Invincible True Ancestors would also be in danger.

He didn't want to fall into the Void Heaven True Country!

"Retreat!"

The voices of the Golden Light Sword Venerable, the Changfeng Sword Venerable, the Purple Red True Ancestor, and the Zigang True Ancestor spread throughout the battlefield.

Suddenly, countless True Ancestors began to withdraw from the Void Heaven True Country.

But with this retreat, the situation was immediately reversed, and many True Ancestors were killed before they could retreat.

After all, running away means that you can only defend, and it is easy to be at a disadvantage.

In this wave of retreat, at least 100,000 True Ancestors were left behind.

Changfeng Sword Venerable, Zi Chi True Ancestor, and Zigang True Ancestor joined forces to remove the Ten Directions Demarcation Stone Enchantment and began to retreat, but Ye Tian did not chase and kill.

Killing an invincible True Ancestor would not change anything, and it would be easy for the Void Heaven True Kingdom to completely face the retaliation of the Upper Triple Heaven forces.

In this case, it is better to let the Heavenly Sword Sect and them withdraw.

In the blink of an eye, the six major forces withdrew one after another, leaving behind a ruin and a large number of True Ancestor's corpses on the battlefield of the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

"All the true ancestors who are killed by themselves will be harvested by themselves, and the true ancestors who died in battle will be brought back with their corpses, and the tombs will be built for burial, and their belongings will be delivered to their descendants or sects!"

The Moon Shooting True Ancestor, who had already been seriously injured, spoke.

Suddenly, the remaining True Ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom began to act.

The True Ancestor's movements and efficiency were very fast, and it took less than a day to deal with them, and the True Ancestors who died in battle were also counted.

In this battle, the Void Heaven True Kingdom lost 520,000 True Ancestors, including eight top True Ancestors.

Originally, there were only thirteen top true ancestors in the Void Heaven True Kingdom, but eight of them fell at once, and only five top true ancestors remained, which can be described as a heavy loss.

However, the Void Heaven True Kingdom has made a name for itself and has deterred the Upper Triple Heaven forces, which is enough to gain a stable development time.

As long as the Void Heaven True Kingdom was given time, they would naturally be able to develop rapidly, and even more Supreme True Ancestors and Top True Ancestors would be born.

......

The Void Heaven True Kingdom defeated the six major forces led by the Heavenly Sword Sect, and this matter quickly spread.

Many of the Upper Triple Heaven forces began to mock the Heavenly Sword Sect one after another.

"The Heavenly Sword Sect is really a waste, and the six forces together can't break through a Void Heaven True Country. Moreover, more than 400,000 True Ancestors were killed, and it seems that dozens of Supreme True Ancestors and a large number of top-level True Ancestors have also been killed!"

"I see, the Heavenly Sword Sect is not worthy of the evaluation of the Eight Heavenly Forces at all, and it is not as good as some of the top Seven Heavenly Forces!"

"The Heavenly Sword Sect Master is wasted, but you can't underestimate the Void Heaven True Country, the news from the Heavenly Sword Sect that the Void Heaven True Country actually has three invincible True Ancestors. "

"The Heavenly Sword Sect said that the True Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws and the Nine Extremes General of Black Wind Mountain are two people, and the previous 1 information is simply wrong, Black Wind Mountain deliberately misled us!"

"The Heavenly Sword Sect lost this time, but it won't lie, it seems that the Nine Extremes General is the Nine Extremes General, and the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor is the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, the two should have a deep relationship, and the talents are about the same, maybe they have obtained the same inheritance, so they have mastered the same Dao Technique. "

"It seems that for the time being, we still can't move the Void Innocent Country, two almost invincible Invincible True Ancestors, once they join forces, it is enough to kill any Invincible True Ancestor!

In the end, these Upper Triple Heaven forces decided not to provoke the Void Heaven True Kingdom for the time being.

They knew very well that a single Eightfold Heaven Force would not be able to break through the Void Heaven True Kingdom at all, and as for the Ninth Heaven Force, they would not attack at will.

Moreover, no one in the Nine Heavens forces could defeat Ye Tian, once he made a move, the loss would inevitably be not small.

Therefore, giving up attacking the Void Heaven True Country is the best choice at the moment.

-------------------

Terran, Temple.

Ye Tian dealt with the aftermath of the death of the True Ancestor in battle, and then came to Ouyang Jiu'er's residence, and specially came to thank Ouyang Jiu'er.

This time, if it weren't for Ouyang Jiu'er's move, Xiao Yue would be in danger, and the Void Heaven True Kingdom would also be in danger.

Therefore, Ouyang Jiu'er has a lot of credit.

"Jiu'er, thank you for your help!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

"It's okay!" Ouyang Jiu'er smiled and said, "You have also helped me a lot, if it weren't for you, I'm afraid I wouldn't have been able to break the shackles and become an invincible true ancestor! They just weren't willing to pay a heavy price, otherwise the Heavenly Sword Sect would also have a way to break through the Void Heaven True Kingdom. Moreover, those three Nine Heavens forces are all very ancient forces, and they also have the ability to kill any invincible true ancestor, but they are not willing to use their hole cards!"

Suddenly.

Ouyang Jiu'er said again: "What's the matter with you and the Nine Extremes General? I remember, you are obviously the Nine Extremes General!"

"That's one of my special talents, you can understand it as a doppelganger talent, although it can be used, but it can't be maintained for a long time, and it can only be used once for a long time!" Ye Tian explained.

He couldn't fool Ouyang Jiu'er into saying that he was not a Jiuji general, because he personally took Ouyang Jiu'er into the Black Wind Mountain, and he couldn't deceive Ouyang Jiu'er.

Even the bloody general of Black Wind Mountain, he couldn't fool him.

Of course, if you can fool other people, that's fine.

"The doppelganger talent, a very powerful talent, now I'm afraid that other forces think that General Jiuji is someone else, so that's fine. At the very least, you're safer! Moreover, you have gotten rid of the relationship with Black Wind Mountain, and the three major Nine Heavens forces are probably not willing to use their hole cards for you. After all, once you are moved, you will still be a threat from the Nine Extremes General!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

Ye Tian didn't stay with Ouyang Jiu'er for too long, and left quickly.

After that, Ye Tian began to retreat and cultivate.

He wanted to rush into the Supreme True Ancestor's combat power as soon as possible, so that he would have the ability to change the current situation, and he would not even be afraid of the threat of any force.

Otherwise, like this time, if it weren't for Ouyang Jiu'er's action, once he was trapped, the copied body would be restrained, and he wouldn't even have a chance to save his wife.

But once he stepped into the ranks of the Supreme True Ancestor, what was the Invincible True Ancestor, he was completely sure that he would kill the other party in a short period of time.
